Fatebringer (Timelost).farming: Farm Vault of Glass Master Templar encounter. Use Spoils of Conquest at the end of the raid to buy additional copies from the final chest.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Explosive Payload + Firefly is the classic PvE workhorse. Explosive Payload gives flat damage bonus + flinch, Firefly chains explosions on precision kills. One of the best all-around HCs in the game.

rolls.name: PvE Frenzy Roll
rolls.description: Explosive Payload + Frenzy for consistent uptime on damage and handling without needing precision kills.

Heritage.farming: Farm Deep Stone Crypt Atraks-1 encounter. Use Spoils of Conquest at the final chest.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Reconstruction auto-loads up to double mag, Recombination gives massive bonus damage on first shot after kills. Best-in-slot kinetic slug shotgun.

rolls.name: PvP Roll
rolls.description: Slideshot + Recombination for aggressive PvP play.

Succession.farming: Farm Deep Stone Crypt Security encounter. Use Spoils at final chest.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Reconstruction + Vorpal for excellent boss DPS. Reconstruction auto-loads, Vorpal gives flat 15% damage to bosses/vehicles.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Snapshot + Vorpal for quick-scoping. Snapshot makes ADS instant.

Trustee.farming: Farm Deep Stone Crypt. Spoils at final chest.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Reconstruction + Redirection for sustained scout damage. Redirection builds up bonus damage against majors.

rolls.name: PvP Roll
rolls.description: Surplus + Vorpal for stats boost and anti-super utility.

Commemoration.farming: Farm Deep Stone Crypt final boss. Spoils at final chest.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Reconstruction + Killing Tally. Best legendary MG in the game. Reconstruction doubles the mag, Killing Tally stacks damage. Devastating add clear and decent sustain.

Calus Mini-Tool.farming: Farm Presage exotic mission on rotating weeks. Buy red borders from the Crown of Sorrow vendor on the Leviathan.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Threat Detector + Incandescent. Top-tier solar add-clear. Incandescent spreads scorch, Threat Detector boosts handling/reload when enemies are near.

rolls.name: PvE Surplus Roll
rolls.description: Unrelenting + Incandescent for healing build.

Austringer.farming: Farm Presage exotic mission. Buy from Crown of Sorrow vendor.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Outlaw + Rampage. Classic precision HC roll. Outlaw for lightning reload, Rampage for stacking damage.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Eye of the Storm + Rangefinder. Peak PvP HC. EotS gives accuracy/reticle bloom reduction as shields drop, Rangefinder increases zoom and range.

Beloved.farming: Farm Presage exotic mission. Buy from Crown of Sorrow vendor.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Snapshot Sights + Quickdraw. Legendary aggressive sniper with Snapshot + Quickdraw is the god roll for PvP. No contest.

rolls.name: PvP No Distractions Roll
rolls.description: No Distractions + Quickdraw for flinch resistance in lane battles.

Drang (Baroque).farming: Farm Presage exotic mission. Buy from Crown of Sorrow vendor.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Incandescent + Wellspring. Pairs with Vexcalibur? No, pairs with Sturm for ridiculous overcharge. Incandescent for solar add clear, Wellspring for ability uptime.

rolls.name: PvP Roll
rolls.description: Moving Target + Zen Moment for sticky aim.

Zaouli's Bane.farming: Farm King's Fall raid. Use Spoils at the end to buy additional copies.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Explosive Payload + Incandescent. The best solar HC for add clear. Explosive Payload for extra damage, Incandescent spreads scorch everywhere. Explodes on every kill.

rolls.name: PvE Firefly Roll
rolls.description: Explosive Payload + Firefly for classic precision chain explosions.

Smite of Merain.farming: Farm King's Fall raid. Spoils at final chest.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Firefly + One For All. Firefly for add clear explosions, One For All for massive damage buff after hitting 3 targets (easy with pulses).

rolls.name: PvE Demo Roll
rolls.description: Demolitionist + Adrenaline Junkie for grenade-centric builds.

Doom of Chelchis.farming: Farm King's Fall Oryx encounter. Spoils at final chest.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Explosive Payload + One For All. Explosive Payload for range damage, OFA for easy 35% damage buff. Great for GMs and endgame.

rolls.name: Anti-Barrier Roll
rolls.description: Shoot to Loot + One For All for ammo economy and consistent damage.

Cataclysmic.farming: Farm Vow of the Disciple raid. Spoils at final chest. Red borders from chests.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Fourth Time's the Charm + Bait and Switch. The undisputed king of LFRs. FTTC refunds rounds on precision hits, Bait and Switch gives 35% damage for using all weapons. God roll DPS weapon.

rolls.name: PvE Solo Roll
rolls.description: Fourth Time's the Charm + Focused Fury for solo play where you can't proc B&S.

Forbearance.farming: Farm Vow of the Disciple. Spoils at final chest.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Ambitious Assassin + Chain Reaction. Best add-clear GL in the game. Ambitious Assassin gives massive overflow on kills, Chain Reaction chains explosions. Destroys entire rooms.

rolls.name: PvE Stats Roll
rolls.description: Stats for All + Chain Reaction for stat boosts while doing add clear.

Insidious.farming: Farm Vow of the Disciple. Spoils at final chest.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Rapid Hit + One For All. Rapid Hit for stability and lightning reload, one trigger of OFA procs easily on this 4-burst and gives 35% damage.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Rapid Hit + Kill Clip for dueling. Rapid Hit boosts stability, Kill Clip procs on kill for two-taps.

Apex Predator.farming: Farm Last Wish raid. Use Wish Wall to reach Shuro Chi checkpoint. Spoils from chests.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Reconstruction + Bait and Switch. Best rocket in the game for boss DPS. Reconstruction double-loads, B&S gives 35% damage. This is the meta DPS rocket.

rolls.name: PvE Overflow Roll
rolls.description: Overflow + Bait and Switch for double-shot without needing Reconstruction.

Tyranny of Heaven.farming: Farm Last Wish. Fastest to farm Morgeth encounter or open secret chests.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Archer's Tempo + Incandescent. Only legendary solar bow. Archer's Tempo for draw speed, Incandescent spreads scorch. Great for solar builds.

rolls.name: PvE Dragonfly Roll
rolls.description: Archer's Tempo + Dragonfly for kinetic-based explosions.

BxR-55 Battler.farming: Run Dares of Eternity on Legend rotation. Buy from Xur on weekends.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Demolitionist + Incandescent. The PvE workhorse. Demo for grenade energy, Incandescent for solar chains. Amazing synergy with solar builds.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Perpetual Motion + Kill Clip. Very strong PvP pulse. PM gives stats on the move, Kill Clip enables two-bursts.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Craftable with Incandescent for solar add clear. Auto-loading for quick swap.

Riptide.farming: Play Crucible matches. Focus at Shaxx. Best farm during double Crucible rep weeks.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Auto-Loading Holster + Chill Clip. The best champ-stunning special weapon in the game. Chill Clip procs slow/freeze, ALH means instant swap. Must-have for all endgame content.

Scatter Signal.farming: Seasonal activity Riven's Lair / The Coil. Run weekly for red borders.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Overflow + Controlled Burst. Overflow gives massive mag, Controlled Burst gives 20% damage on sustained fire. Crazy DPS potential.

Lost Signal.farming: Seasonal activity Riven's Lair / The Coil.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Auto-Loading Holster + Chill Clip. Like Riptide but in the kinetic slot and area-denial frame. Covers ground in stasis. Incredible utility for endgame.

rolls.name: PvE Lead from Gold Roll
rolls.description: Lead from Gold + Chill Clip for double-special builds where heavy ammo drops refill this.

Multimach CCX.farming: Play Iron Banner when available. Focus at Saladin.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Dynamic Sway Reduction + Kill Clip / Tap the Trigger. One of the best kinetic SMGs for PvP. DSR tightens the cone, KC for 2-tap potential.

rolls.name: PvP Model 8 Red
rolls.description: Model 8 Red sight gives 15 zoom for superior range. DSR + Kill Clip.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Auto-Loading Holster + Vorpal / Blind. The best kinetic blinding GL. ALH for instant swap, blind for add control.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Perpetual Motion + Opening Shot. Lightweight frame, great handling. PM for stats, OS for first shot accuracy.

Nation of Beasts.farming: Farm Last Wish Morgeth encounter. Spoils from chests.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Dragonfly + Voltshot. Arc add-clear monster. Dragonfly explosions chain, Voltshot jolts nearby enemies on reload after kill. Synergises perfectly.

The Epicurean.farming: Farm Presage mission. Crown of Sorrow vendor.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Feeding Frenzy + Reservoir Burst. Void wave clear fusion. Reservoir Burst on overloaded mag is insane for add clear.

Fixed Odds.farming: Crown of Sorrow vendor. Presage mission.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Feeding Frenzy + Incandescent / Killing Tally. Solar MG with Incandescent for scorch chains or Killing Tally for stacking damage.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Envious Assassin + Repulsor Brace. Void trace that constantly recharges with Envious and gives overshields with Repulsor on void debuffed kills.

Luna's Howl.farming: Play Competitive PvP. Focus engrams at Shaxx.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Perfect Float + Opening Shot / Keep Away. Precision frame + damage perk synergy. Great for in-air accuracy and dueling.

Igneous Hammer.farming: Play Trials of Osiris. Flawless cards. Focus at Saint-14.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Keep Away + Eye of the Storm / Precision Instrument. The best 120 HC for PvP. Keep Away for range stats bonus, EotS for dueling.

The Immortal.farming: Play Trials of Osiris. Flawless cards. Focus at Saint-14.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Dynamic Sway Reduction + Rangefinder / Target Lock. Currently the best 750 SMG in the game. DSR + Target Lock is oppressive.

The Summoner.farming: Trials of Osiris. Flawless. Focus at Saint-14.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Subsistence + Adrenaline Junkie / Rampage for add clear.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Dynamic Sway Reduction + Rangefinder / Target Lock. Consistent 600 RPM dueling AR.

Wendigo GL3.farming: Farm Nightfall Strikes when Wendigo is on rotation. Higher difficulties drop better rolls.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Auto-Loading Holster + Explosive Light. Top-tier heavy GL. ALH for quick swap, Explosive Light for 25% damage buff on orb pickup. Great for DPS phases.

rolls.name: PvE Cascade Point Roll
rolls.description: Auto-Loading Holster + Cascade Point for faster follow-up shots.

Koraxis's Distress.farming: Farm Root of Nightmares raid. Spoils at final chest.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Envious Assassin + Explosive Light. Envious overflows mag massively, Explosive Light gives consistent damage. Good for burst DPS.

rolls.name: PvE Bait and Switch Roll
rolls.description: Envious Assassin + Bait and Switch for max DPS.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Reconstruction + Explosive Light. Precision frame rocket with Recon for auto-loading and EL for damage. Solid DPS option.

Taipan-4FR.farming: Free from the Enclave on Mars quest. Farm world drops for red borders.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Triple Tap + Firing Line. Free-to-play god roll LFR. Triple Tap refunds on precision hits, Firing Line gives 25% damage near teammates. Amazing for beginners.

Touch of Malice.farming: Farm King's Fall raid final boss for Exotic drop chance. Once per week per character.

rolls.name: Exotic
rolls.description: Exotic intrinsic. Last round in magazine consumes health to return ammo. Final round deals bonus damage. Pairs with Well of Radiance and other healing sources for infinite ammo DPS.

Outbreak Perfected.farming: Zero Hour exotic mission on rotation. Farm boss for catalyst completion.

rolls.name: Exotic
rolls.description: Exotic intrinsic. Precision hits spawn SIVA nanites that attach to enemies. Multiple Outbreaks stack nanite damage. Top-tier DPS when multiple users. Also excellent for add clear.

Witherhoard.farming: Buy from the Monument to Lost Lights at the Tower. Requires Exotic Cipher + materials.

rolls.name: Exotic
rolls.description: Exotic intrinsic with Catalyst. Blight rounds leave a damage pool. Direct hits attach a blight that damages over time. Best-in-slot special weapon for all content. Pairs with Auto-Loading Holster (catayst). Use as primary DPS tag + swap.

Izanagi's Burden.farming: Buy from Monument to Lost Lights.

rolls.name: Exotic
rolls.description: Honed Edge x4 provides massive single-shot damage. Pairs with Wendigo or rocket for peak DPS combo. Catalyst gives reload boost.

Divinity.farming: Buy from Monument to Lost Lights. Quest from the Lure.

rolls.name: Exotic
rolls.description: Creates a large crit bubble on sustained fire. Debuffs target for 15% increased damage. REQUIRED for all endgame DPS. Every raid team wants one.

Gjallarhorn.farming: Complete Grasp of Avarice dungeon on any character. Exotic quest from Shaw Han.

rolls.name: Exotic
rolls.description: Exotic rockets have Wolfpack Rounds that track targets. Wolfpack Rounds buff OTHER players' rockets by 25-35%. One Gjally buffs an entire fireteam's rocket DPS. Essential for any rocket DPS meta.

Parasite.farming: Quest from Mara Sov. Buy from Monument if missed.

rolls.name: Exotic
rolls.description: Worm's Hunger stacks damage per kill before firing. At max stacks (20), one-shots nearly anything. Great for burst damage phases.

Xenophage.farming: Quest from Pit of Heresy dungeon.

rolls.name: Exotic
rolls.description: High-damage explosive rounds. No precision damage needed, hits hard. Excellent for easy DPS, anti-Champion, and destroying vehicles. Consistently good regardless of game updates.

Thunderlord.farming: World drop Exotic. Buy from Monument to Lost Lights.

rolls.name: Exotic
rolls.description: Sustained fire increases rate of fire and lightning strikes. Excellent add clear and solid DPS for a MG. Catalyst increases mag size.

The Other Half.farming: Dares of Eternity. Focus treasure rooms.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Eager Edge + Vorpal. Eager Edge gives massive lunge on swap for movement tech. Vorpal for damage. Eager Edge is essential for speedrunning and movement.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Eager Edge for movement. Pair with The Other Half for max sword coverage. Combo with energy transfer for utility.

Crown-Splitter.farming: Gunsmith rank-ups or world drops. Titan-only drop then craftable via collections.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Relentless Strikes + Whirlwind Blade. Classic sword DPS combo. Relentless for ammo economy, Whirlwind for stacking damage.

Empty Vessel.farming: Vanguard playlist. Focus at Commander Zavala.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Auto-Loading Holster + Vorpal / Blinding Grenades. Top-tier kinetic blinding GL. Blinding is essential for GMs.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Auto-Loading Holster + Vorpal / Blinding. Kinetic blinding GL alternative to Empty Vessel.

Rufus's Fury.farming: Farm Root of Nightmares raid. Spoils at final chest.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Demolitionist + Hatchling / Target Lock. Strand auto with Demo for grenade energy, Hatchling for threadlings or Target Lock for bonus damage.

rolls.name: PvE Rewind Rounds Roll
rolls.description: Rewind Rounds + Hatchling for almost infinite mag via rewinding rounds.

Conditional Finality.farming: Root of Nightmares raid final boss. Once per week per character for exotic drop.

rolls.name: Exotic
rolls.description: Dual-fire elemental shotgun. One shot freezes (Stasis), the next ignites (Solar). Best PvE special weapon for champ stunning. Also insane for PvP for the freeze capability. Best shotgun in the game.

Final Warning.farming: Season pass reward or buy from Monument.

rolls.name: Exotic
rolls.description: Lock-on targeting sidearm. Hip-fire locks onto targets, ADS fires all lock-on rounds at once. Devastating damage. Great for strand builds. Unmatched burst damage for a primary.

The Mountaintop.farming: Buy from Monument to Lost Lights.

rolls.name: Exotic
rolls.description: Micro-missile frame. Fires straight with no arc. Great for burst damage. Micromissile intrinsic + Autoloading.

Deliverance.farming: Vow of the Disciple. Spoils at final chest.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Demolitionist + Chill Clip / Successful Warmup. Stasis fusion with Demo for grenade energy. Chill Clip for slow/freeze on every bolt.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Rewind Rounds + One For All / Rampage. Rewind for nearly infinite mag, OFA for 35% damage buff.

Prophet of Doom.farming: Garden of Salvation Sanctified Mind encounter.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Auto-Loading Holster + One Two Punch / Vorpal. Precision slug with ALH for swap play, 1-2 Punch for melee builds.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Rapid Hit + Kill Clip / Rampage. Precision frame HC with great PvP perks. Rapid Hit for consistency, KC for two-taps.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Auto-Loading Holster + Vorpal / One Two Punch. Lightweight frame shotgun. ALH for swap play.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Quickdraw + Snapshot Sights for instant swap and ADS.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Feeding Frenzy + Vorpal / Swashbuckler. Good sidearm with Warmind cell capability (legacy).

Funnelweb.farming: World drops. Banshee-44 rank-ups. Ghoul activity during Season of Plunder.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Subsistence + Frenzy. The legendary void SMG. Subsistence auto-reloads on kill, Frenzy gives 15% damage + handling/reload on sustained combat. Best-in-class for void builds.

rolls.name: PvE ADEPT Roll
rolls.description: Subsistence + Adrenaline Junkie for grenade builds.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Subsistence + Dragonfly / Rampage. Void SMG. Subsistence + Dragonfly for explosive add clear.

Palindrome.farming: Nightfall Strikes on rotation weeks. Higher difficulty = better drop rate.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Overflow + One For All. Overflow for massive mag, OFA for 35% damage. Great for GMs where you want range + damage.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll
rolls.description: Quickdraw + Rangefinder. Classic PvP 140 HC. Quickdraw for ready speed, Rangefinder for range.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Rapid Hit + Precision Instrument / Explosive Payload. Classic primary scout. Rapid Hit for stability and reload, PI for precision damage or EP for flat bonus.

rolls.name: PvE GM Roll
rolls.description: Shoot to Loot + One For All for ammo and damage in GMs.

The Hothead.farming: Nightfall Strikes on rotation. Grandmaster for Adept version.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Auto-Loading Holster + Explosive Light / Vorpal. Excellent rocket for DPS. ALH is essential for rocket rotations.

rolls.name: PvE Adept Roll
rolls.description: Tracking Module + Explosive Light for consistency with tracking.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Subsistence + Vorpal / Surrounded. Void MG with Subsistence for ammo and Vorpal for boss damage.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Triple Tap + Firing Line. Stasis LFR. TT for ammo refund, Firing Line for 25% damage with teammates.

rolls.description: Overflow + Frenzy. Kinetic SMG with Overflow for massive mag, Frenzy for consistent 15% damage + handling/reload.

rolls.name: PvE God Roll

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
rolls.description: Triple Tap + Firing Line. Kinetic sniper. TT for ammo, FL for team damage. Solid option.

rolls.name: PvP God Roll

rolls.name: PvE God Roll
